findingDetails.message: Rename the non-exempt hyphenated asset basename to lowercase snake_case and update its consumers.

detail.claim: The audited Markdown basename uses hyphens despite the sk-doc lowercase snake_case filename rule.
detail.reprobeEvidence: .opencode/skills/mcp-tooling/mcp-refero/assets/utcp-refero-manual.md:1 exists under the non-exempt hyphenated basename; .opencode/skills/sk-doc/shared/references/core_standards.md:37-51 retains the snake_case rule and its three exceptions.
detail.knownDeviationCheck: sk_doc_known_deviations.md legacy kebab-case entry applies to legacy filename references, not the audited artifact basename; no match.
